title: lastrea syrmatica
intro: Lastrea syrmatica, also known as the Syrmatic Lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. Its health benefits include the potential to soothe coughs and colds, as well as provide relief from skin irritations and allergies. The herbal preparations of Lastrea syrmatica typically involve infusions or teas made from the dried fronds, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
